synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-19607 Oracle Linux 8 flatpak-runtime-config bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19607
description:
[34-4.0.1]
- Ship Oracle Linux xml files

[34-4]
- Re-enable the python2 support and fix various things that broke when I've
  by mistake used RHEL 9 SRPM when importing into RHEL 8
- Resolves: RHEL-121407

[34-3]
- Sync with Fedora
- Add a seed for <dir prefix="xdg">fonts</dir> (by tagoh)

[34-2]
- Sync with Fedora
- Correctly substitute /app/lib in flatpak-builder defaults.json ldflags (by klember)
- Include fonts-dirs.xml in fontconfig flatpak configuration (by tagoh)
- Add 05-flatpak-fontpath.conf that forces a different MD5 for fontconfig cache to avoid
  conflict between caches on host and flatpak (by tagoh)

[34-1]
- Install flatpak-builder defaults.json config file

[33-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_34_Mass_Rebuild

[33-1]
- Install appdata for both the Platform and the Sdk

[32-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_33_Mass_Rebuild

[32-1]
- Remove Python 2 support (#1801932)

[30-3]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_32_Mass_Rebuild
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-19607

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-19607.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
flatpak-runtime-config-34-4.0.1.el8_10.i686.rpm
flatpak-runtime-config-34-4.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
flatpak-runtime-config-34-4.0.1.el8_10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/flatpak-runtime-config-34-4.0.1.el8_10.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[34-4.0.1]
- Ship Oracle Linux xml files

[34-4]
- Re-enable the python2 support and fix various things that broke when I've
  by mistake used RHEL 9 SRPM when importing into RHEL 8
- Resolves: RHEL-121407

[34-3]
- Sync with Fedora
- Add a seed for <dir prefix="xdg">fonts</dir> (by tagoh)

[34-2]
- Sync with Fedora
- Correctly substitute /app/lib in flatpak-builder defaults.json ldflags (by klember)
- Include fonts-dirs.xml in fontconfig flatpak configuration (by tagoh)
- Add 05-flatpak-fontpath.conf that forces a different MD5 for fontconfig cache to avoid
  conflict between caches on host and flatpak (by tagoh)

[34-1]
- Install flatpak-builder defaults.json config file

[33-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_34_Mass_Rebuild

[33-1]
- Install appdata for both the Platform and the Sdk

[32-2]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_33_Mass_Rebuild

[32-1]
- Remove Python 2 support (#1801932)

[30-3]
- Rebuilt for https://fedoraproject.org/wiki/Fedora_32_Mass_Rebuild
